question: The hero of the folk epic Siyavush fell in love with the khan's daughter. The khan did not want to give her to the hero and declared that he must build a palace for his wife. At the same time, the khan gave HIM HER. Siyavush spent the whole night doing with HER the same thing that was done in another similar legend, and in the end, he also succeeded. Name HER in two words.
